mapper.sql: id, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, modelNo, quantity, transType, requestTime, hopeDeliveryDate, supplierId, stateCode, ordType, hopeExportDate, shikomiAnswerNo, deptNo, qtyReceive, finishdate, smcCode, productType, customerNo, userNo, salesInfoNo, purchaseType, importCurrencyId, updateTime, corderNO, inventoryPropertyId, requestWarehouseId, qtyImport
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ording_po_view
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ording_po_view (id, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, modelNo, quantity, transType, requestTime, hopeDeliveryDate, supplierId, stateCode, ordType, hopeExportDate, shikomiAnswerNo, deptNo, qtyReceive, finishdate, smcCode, productType, customerNo, userNo, salesInfoNo, purchaseType, importCurrencyId, updateTime, corderNO, inventoryPropertyId, requestWarehouseId, qtyImport) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{requesttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hopeexportdate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{shikomianswerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qtyreceive,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{finishdate,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{producttype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesinfono,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{importcurrencyid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventorypropertyid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{requestwarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qtyimport,jdbcType=INTEGER})

update dbo.ording_po_view
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
orderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
itemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
splitItemNo = #{record.splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
transType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
requestTime = #{record.requesttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
hopeDeliveryDate = #{record.hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=DATE},
supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ordType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hopeExportDate = #{record.hopeexportdate,jdbcType=DATE},
shikomiAnswerNo = #{record.shikomianswerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qtyReceive = #{record.qtyreceive,jdbcType=INTEGER},
finishdate = #{record.finishdate,jdbcType=INTEGER},
smcCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
productType = #{record.producttype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salesInfoNo = #{record.salesinfono,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
purchaseType = #{record.purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR},
importCurrencyId = #{record.importcurrencyid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
corderNO = #{record.corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventoryPropertyId = #{record.inventorypropertyid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
requestWarehouseId = #{record.requestwarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qtyImport = #{record.qtyimport,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.ording_po_view set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, orderNo = #{record.orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, itemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, splitItemNo = #{record.splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, transType = #{record.transtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, requestTime = #{record.requesttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, hopeDeliveryDate = #{record.hopedeliverydate,jdbcType=DATE}, supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ordType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hopeExportDate = #{record.hopeexportdate,jdbcType=DATE}, shikomiAnswerNo = #{record.shikomianswerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, deptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qtyReceive = #{record.qtyreceive,jdbcType=INTEGER}, finishdate = #{record.finishdate,jdbcType=INTEGER}, smcCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, productType = #{record.producttype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salesInfoNo = #{record.salesinfono,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, purchaseType = #{record.purchasetype,jdbcType=CHAR}, importCurrencyId = #{record.importcurrencyid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, corderNO = #{record.corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventoryPropertyId = #{record.inventorypropertyid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, requestWarehouseId = #{record.requestwarehouseid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qtyImport = #{record.qtyimport,jdbcType=INTEGER}
